narrative:
Ramin Rezaian is an Iranian right-back with an overall rating of 7.36/10. This places him in the top 1% of right-backs at this tournament, reflecting his consistent performance. His rating is weighted 67% from club form over the last two seasons and 33% from his contributions at this World Cup.

At this World Cup, Rezaian has demonstrated significant attacking output, scoring 0.667 goals per 90 minutes and providing 0.333 assists per 90 minutes. He consistently creates opportunities, registering 2.0 key passes per 90 minutes, well above his 0.156 expected assists. Defensively, he contributes with 2.0 tackles per 90 minutes.

Rezaian plays a vital attacking role for his national team, providing a constant threat from the right flank. Scouts and fans should observe his continued ability to exceed his expected goals and assists metrics in the remaining matches. His offensive contributions, alongside his 270 minutes of World Cup experience, will be crucial for Iran.
